sql_array: CREATE TABLE trigonometry (angle REAL, cot_value REAL);
INSERT INTO trigonometry (angle, cot_value) VALUES (0.5, cot(0.5));
UPDATE trigonometry SET cot_value = cot(angle + 1) WHERE angle = 0.5;
SELECT angle, cot(angle) AS cotangent FROM trigonometry;
DELETE FROM trigonometry WHERE cot_value IS NULL;
